title: Lineage graph cannot be completed — income item has no traceable source

expected_output.failure_reason: Income of ₹50,000 in Head 5 has no traceable source — not from any evidence document and not user-declared
expected_output.error_message: Cannot generate explanation for an income item without provenance. This indicates a bug in Engine 2 (Income Classification) — an income item was classified without a source reference.

notes: The lineage graph must be complete before Stage 13 can run. An orphaned node — a computed value with no traceable source — indicates a bug in Engine 2 that allowed an income item to be classified without recording its origin. This test verifies that R-0014 detects this condition and blocks Stage 13 rather than generating an unexplainable result.
